portal_name: MyBMC Swachhata / BMC Solid Waste Management
citation: Verified Swachh Bharat and clean city registration portal listed on MCGM website (https://portal.mcgm.gov.in).
Civil safety issues like structural collapses or streetlights belong to BMC (https://portal.mcgm.gov.in); police site is for crime/law.

Road safety hazards (streetlights, potholes) belong to MCD (https://mcdonline.nic.in) or PWD, not Delhi Police.
Verified official Delhi Public Grievance Monitoring System site (https://pgms.delhi.gov.in).
